About: It is about the Ayyubid dynasty.
Affects: It had a transformative effect on the region, particularly Egypt.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Zengid ruler Nur al-Din.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Sunni Muslim Kurdish dynasty.
CreatedTo: It was created to establish the medieval Sultanate of Egypt.
HasA: It has a history of economic prosperity.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the vigorous strengthening of Sunni Muslim dominance in the region.
Influenced: It influenced the region's political and military landscape.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Abbasid Caliphate.
IsA: It is a Sunni Muslim Kurdish dynasty.
It is a medieval Sultanate of Egypt.
KnownAs: It is known as the Ayyubid Sultanate.
It is referred to as the "Kurdish regime/dynasty".
It is referred to as the "dynasty/regime of the Kurds".
It is referred to as the "Kurdish Kingdom".
It is referred to as the "Ayyubid Kurds".
It is referred to as "Kurdish rulers of Egypt".
KnownFor: It is known for ushering in an era of economic prosperity.
It is known for strengthening Sunni Muslim dominance in the region.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Egypt.
It occurred in Syria.
It occurred in Hejaz.
It occurred in Yemen.
It occurred in northern Nubia.
It occurred in Tripolitania.
It occurred in Upper Mesopotamia.
It occurred in the Nile Delta.
It occurred in Aleppo.
It occurred in Barqa.
UsedFor: It is used for strengthening Sunni Muslim dominance in the region.
UsedTo: It is used to strengthen Sunni Muslim dominance in the region.
